calendar.matters:
Motion And Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER TERI KELLEY, MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC.'s Motion And Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioners TERI KELLEY and MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC's unopposed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, the Petition to Confirm the Arbitrator's Award is granted and the arbitration is confirmed in its entirety and Judgment shall be entered consistent with the Award.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
